item.title: I was interviewed for NPR!!
item.description: I had VNS surgery last fall. My sister is a producer for the TED Radio Hour, and their episode this week was about brain hacks, and as a lifelong NPR nerd, this might just be the coolest thing that's ever happened to me. https://www.npr.org/2024/01/26/1226681286/how-a-tiny-implant-can-stop-seizures-from-happening?utm_term=nprnews&utm_campaign=npr&utm_source=facebook.com&utm_medium=social&fbclid=IwAR0quIH0UsXZfFVKEhkrk_MQgU68HO3nZ_lSUCvI4HvJLDCuUvSuui0b8q0
item.dc:creator: MissJane

item.dc:creator: Hauntologist2

item.title: Happiness ist the best
item.description: Letting go is the best! I didn’t even know what it felt like to be just contented and actually happy with my life! Thanks you guys for your support. For those who might care: after everything that’s happened between me and my husband I swore to myself to not go back to the relationship as it was before. Still I was willing to give everything a chance and offered that we could commit to working on us but from separated homes and see where it takes us. He started therapy and that’s good for him. He wasn’t up to committing to anything and instead of wasting away in grief, I just let go. It was tough but today for the first time in years I saw a silver lining. It stopped hurting for a while. I was just proud of myself, taking care of my children and our home, nothing more. No pain. No regret. Just relief. I know the pain will be back on worse days. But those will happen less. As I've seen it now, I know a bright side actually exists.
item.dc:creator: PotatoCatPerson

item.title: LISTEN TO OUR SCREAMS FOR HELP
item.description:
Go support Erin https://open.substack.com/pub/erininthemorn/p/ohio-michigan-republicans-in-released?utm_source=share&utm_medium=android&r=2dhxde
https://youtu.be/Dy-_4WyxoWQ
Trans people are under attack and they absolutely need to be voted out. If you consider yourself any level of an idea, help us PLEASE WE ARE GETTING TARGETED, HAVING OUR HEALTHCARE REVOKED, OUR RIGHTS TO EXIST IN PUBLIC PLACES THROWN AWAY, STOCHASTIC TERRORIST TALKING HEADS ARE TARGETING US AND WE ARE BEING KILLED (ESPECIALLY TRANS PEOPLE OF COLOR) PLEASE HELP PLEASE HELP PLEASE PLEASE LISTEN TO OUR CRIES
item.dc:creator: chaosbuni

item.title: Fix the app!
item.description: After a few minutes of scrolling memes the apps frame rate drops. Videos become laggy and I have to close the app by force and clear cache. Android 14 on a Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra. Please #imgurappdevelopers fix this!
item.dc:creator: Rogfitz

item.title: Adam West (Batman) & Julie Newmar (Catwoman) from the late 1960s live action tv series ‘Batman’. West (1928-2017) and Newmar would reprise their roles together as Batman and Catwoman in the DC animated films “Batman: Return of the Caped Crusaders” (2016)
item.dc:creator: Joyika
